svg.text: Order Tracking System — Low Level Design (LLD)
PENDING→CONFIRMED: all items have sufficient inventory
orders: order_id PK, customer_id, merchant_id, state, delivery_address JSONB, currency, placed_at, updated_at, agent_id FK
order_items: item_id PK, order_id FK, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price, total_price
order_events: event_id PK, order_id FK, event_type, from_state, to_state, actor_id, actor_type, reason, occurred_at (append-only)
delivery_agents: agent_id PK, name, phone, vehicle_type, status, current_order_id FK
products: product_id PK, merchant_id, name, unit_price, available_qty, reserved_qty
notifications: notification_id PK, order_id FK, recipient_id, channel, message, sent_at, status
Indexes: idx_orders_customer, idx_orders_state, idx_order_events_order_id, idx_order_events_occurred_at, idx_products_merchant
Constraints: state IN (valid enum values), reserved_qty <= available_qty CHECK, one BUSY agent per order_id
Archival: rows with placed_at < NOW()-90d moved to S3/Parquet via scheduled job
